case_title: D'OSCAR LLC VS. HIGGINS PURCHASING GROUP INC., et al

docket_entries.description: PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE DEC-02-2004.

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR DOCUMENTS; FOR DEEMED ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $536.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DISCOVERY, 612, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR MONETARY & TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED ON FEB-04-05. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS PURCHASING GROUP INC.
